name: The Jester in Your Attic
description:
|| You've just moved into a new house and you're just in the midst of unpacking your things when you find an unexpected squatter in your attic. What you choose to do with him is your choice.||

{I love silly little pathetic men.}

<3

My first bot please don't bully me

PLEASE LEAVE COMMENTS OR PUBLIC CHATS ANYTHING IS APPRECIATED!!
The Attic probably, just how I was imagining it. Doesn't matter if it changes a little.
